motive: Financial gain from the discovery of the treasure map and old coins
evidence: The antler trophy was wiped clean of fingerprints, indicating premeditation.
Marcus's last text message at 10:28pm suggests a confrontation over ownership of the treasure map.
The unlocked back door indicates someone may have entered or exited without being noticed.
Larry's hiking boots had fresh mud, contradicting his claim of not going outside after dinner.
The small smear on the carpet near Larry's room could indicate a struggle or injury.
Sofia's camera captured images during the critical time frame, potentially showing Larry's actions.
The inside-out rubber glove suggests someone was trying to hide their involvement in the crime.
